church_profile.name: International Christian Center | Los Angeles
church_profile.description: A Multicultural Christian Haven for Worshipping Jesus Christ
church_profile.vision: To make disciples of all nations by teaching, preaching, instructing in the undiluted word of God and through community stewardship

leadership.name: Pastor Dipo Kalejaiye
leadership.title: Senior Pastor / Founder
leadership.bio: Dr. Oladipo Kalejaiye is the founding Senior Pastor of International Christian Center, Los Angeles. He holds a PhD in Law and has over 25 years of litigation experience. He anchors the Hotline to Heaven global prayer ministry daily at 8:00 AM.

leadership.name: Pastor Nony Kalejaiye
leadership.title: First Lady / Co-Pastor
leadership.bio: Dr. Nonyelum Kalejaiye is the co-founding pastor and First Lady of ICCLA. She holds a Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) degree. She leads the 40 Days of Waiting Upon the Lord prayer initiative for 2026.

ministries.name: T.O.R.C.H. Nation
ministries.description: Young Adults Ministry. T.O.R.C.H. stands for 'when you are Transformed and Open, Real Change Happens.' Trendy, contemporary worship and praise, relatable life transformation groups, and regular, refreshing events.

ministries.name: Sheepfold Ministry
ministries.description: Children's Church with well-trained, professional Christian teachers and exquisite facilities. Parents may stay with their child in the sanctuary or release them to the Children's Church. Nursery available for little ones.

ministries.name: Fresh Fire Youth Ministry
ministries.description: Teens Church providing an assortment of youth activities for teens all year round.

ministries.name: Rooted
ministries.description: Life transformation groups. The Rooted experience redefines how people live life and view their relationship with God and others, giving context to what it means to be part of something bigger. Experience life marked by community, authenticity, and generosity.

ministries.name: ICC Connect Groups
ministries.description: A cozy haven for Christian fellowship where members engage in interactive discussions, meet new people, and celebrate milestones. Open to both members and non-members of the church.

ministries.name: Vineyard Voices
ministries.description: Music Ministry led by Dr. Kunle Pinmiloye (Ksticks). Key activities include Congregational Worship sessions, Special Ministrations, Praise & Worship services (Altar of Praise), and Special Musical Concerts including the ICCLA Sound of Christmas.

ministries.name: Single Saved and Serving Ministry
ministries.description: Connects, encourages, and supports seasoned singles as they live a life of faith and trust in God, guiding Christian single adults as they grow in their spiritual, social, and personal lives.

ministries.name: The Harvesters
ministries.description: Outreach and evangelism ministry of ICCLA.

giving.philosophy: ICCLA strives to be a church characterized by generosity — not just in financial contributions but in every act of kindness and service. Tithing and offerings reflect trust in Jesus as the ultimate provider.

events.title: 40 Days Fasting & Prayer
events.description: 40 Days of Waiting Upon the Lord in prayer, led by Pastor Nony Kalejaiye. Part of the 2026 Year of Divine Manifestation theme.

messages.title: Prophetic Encounter Night with Pastor Nony Kalejaiye
messages.speaker: Pastor Nony Kalejaiye

messages.title: How to Wage a Good Warfare
messages.speaker: Pastor Dipo Kalejaiye

messages.title: Securing the Foundations of the Year
messages.speaker: Pastor Dipo Kalejaiye

messages.title: When God's Word Makes No Sense
messages.speaker: Pastor Dipo Kalejaiye

messages.title: The Believer's Victory Over the Spirit of Herod
messages.speaker: Pastor Dipo Kalejaiye

messages.title: The Spirit of Christ is Always Reconciliatory
messages.speaker: Pastor Dipo Kalejaiye

messages.title: The 5 Gates of Life You Must Control to Thrive in Babylon
messages.speaker: Pastor Dipo Kalejaiye

hotlineToHeaven.name: Hotline to Heaven
hotlineToHeaven.description: Global, non-denominational prayer ministry anchored by Dr. Dipo Kalejaiye. A three-in-one fiery arsenal: The Word, Prayer & Prophecy, to combat the forces of darkness.
hotlineToHeaven.schedule: Daily at 8:00 AM; Sunday sermon re-broadcast daily at 12:00 PM PST
hotlineToHeaven.access: Download the ICCLA Church Mobile App from Apple or Google Store and click the Hotline to Heaven logo
